Name: ASHWINI S
Aptitude Test:
The aptitute test consisted of 6 timed sections:
1. Speed test (25 questions in 5min)
2. Quantitative aptitude
3. Logical reasoning
4. Verbal
5. Coding 
6. Technical MCQs
The questions were of easy-moderate level.
Each section is timed and will automatically switch to the next section after the time limit.
Interview:
There were 3 rounds
1. Job role based assesment.
This round was of 3hrs where they test the creativity of the candidates.
We were asked to define the overview of our product along with mock-ups of the main view.

2. Technical Interview.
Questions based on the assignment were asked.
Situation based questions w.r.t job role (Product Engineer) were asked.

3. Tech + HR Interview
Questions based on our product along with general HR questions we asked.
Problem-solving skills were tested in this round.
No. of rounds & Names of those:
No. of rounds:4
1. Aptitutude
2. Role based assesment
3. Tech interview
4. HR interview
Questions asked during F2F interview:
Tell me about youself.
Questions based on your product.
What changes would you like to make on a product that you use and why?
What additional feature would you like to add to a particular application?
Explanation about your projects.
Why did you choose this particular role/why do you think you are the best fit for this role?
Situation based questions such as:
How would you measure the success of a product?
How would you reduce the work load of your colleagues?

Name: R V PRANAV SAI
Aptitude Test:
The aptitute test consisted of 6 timed sections:  
1. Speed test (25 questions in 5min)
2. Quantitative aptitude
3. Logical reasoning
4. Verbal
5. Coding 
6. Technical MCQs
The questions were of easy-moderate level.
Each section is timed and will automatically switch to the next section after the time limit. Time Management is very Important in this test .
Interview:
You will be given a choice for the roles that are available. We had a choice between product management and Development job roles. Based on your preference of the job role your interview experience will vary greatly. I chose to apply as a Product Manager. We had 3 rounds:

1. TASK: For those who chose product management, we were given a task to give the entire product roadmap from Ideation to deployment and also focus on the business aspect of our product, which includes revenue streams, Unique Selling points, Cost of developing our product and so on. They are mainly looking at our creativity, problem solving and critical thinking. We were given a time of 3 hours to complete this task/round

2. TECHNICAL INTERVIEW: Based on our performances in the task, they will shortlist candidates for the technical interview. You will be asked questions about your task in round 1 so that they can better understand your thought process. Questions will also be based on product management such as SDLC, AGILE, Waterfall model, Key metrics etc.

3. HR Round: After shortlisting from the technical interview round, if you are selected there will be an HR Interview round and here they ask questions to test your communication and inter personal skills and how you work as part of a team. Questions regarding your task from round 1 will also be asked here
No. of rounds & Names of those:
No. of rounds:4
1. Aptitutude
2. Role based assesment / Task
3. Technical interview
4. HR interview
Questions asked during F2F interview:
General HR Questions like tell me about yourself, your strengths and weaknesses etc

Questions based on your task, why a particular feature was added, who were the target audiences for our product, what was the unique selling point etc..

situation based questions such as :
how would I measure the success of a new feature that the developement team has rolled out for a product?
What would I do if we cannot deliver a said feature/ product to a client or customer within the deadline ?

questions about why you want to choose product management will also be asked
